ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

I have a good 4 button panel for second machine as well. Will require some disassembly to get out the door.

The monitor probably has fewer than 200 hours on it since it was constructed. The sides are new, smooth black laminate. You can see a couple of tears in the side art that happened during transport, but otherwise a perfect specimen. Ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. I'm asking $1500 OBO and open to trades.

ads.author: Erin Svendsen Meyer
ads.title: Police Trainer Classic Arcade Game
ads.description: Classic Police Trainer Arcade Game with police Vector light bar and strobes in great condition. This is an original Police Trainer arcade machine made in 1997. Everything works great including the blue lights which you can turn on and off independently. Police Trainer is a target shooting simulation game that takes 1 or 2 players through a series of levels created to help develop skills such as accuracy, speed, decision making, etc., as you compete for high scores. This game has been a lot of fun for our family and friends. It is all target shooting so there's no blood or actual violence; rated for mature responsible ages and individuals. This arcade machine is big and very heavy. If you need it delivered, text me and we might be able to work it out depending on delivery location. Dimensions: H=80in, D=40in, W=32in Asking $1500 but will entertain REASONABLE offers. If you lowball, I won't respond. If you have something to trade, text me and let me know. eight four three five one four nine nine seven five

ads.author: Martin Maignan
ads.title: Midway's 1994 arcade classic, Cruis'n USA
ads.description: This arcade machine is working. It is in descent shape all around with some imperfections. The cabinet is solid but there is some minor cabinet damage and wear and tare. (See pictures and make your own judgement). The game board is Cruisin' USA. The monitor looks good. The steering and buttons are both responsive. This arcade is a BLAST! This would make a amazing present for any age, add to your man cave, or your game room.
